features.label: Urgency
features.description: The message uses urgency to push the user into a fast reaction.

features.label: Account threat
features.description: The message threatens account blocking, suspension or restriction.

features.label: Credential request
features.description: The message asks for a password, login action or account verification.

features.label: Payment request
features.description: The message requests a payment, fee, card details or bank information.

features.label: Suspicious link
features.description: The message contains a link that may lead to a fake or unsafe website.

features.label: Prize bait
features.description: The message promises a prize, reward or bonus to manipulate the user.

features.label: Unknown or unclear sender
features.description: The message does not clearly identify an official sender or institution.

features.label: Fake delivery fee
features.description: The message imitates a delivery provider and asks for a small parcel or shipping fee.

threatTypes.label: Fake bank message
threatTypes.description: A scam that imitates a bank in order to steal credentials, personal data or money.

threatTypes.label: Fake delivery message
threatTypes.description: A scam that imitates a courier or delivery service and asks for a fee or personal data.

threatTypes.label: Fake prize scam
threatTypes.description: A scam that promises a prize and leads the user to a link, payment or data request.

threatTypes.label: Credential phishing
threatTypes.description: A phishing attack focused on stealing passwords, security codes or login credentials.

recommendations.label: Do not open the link
recommendations.text: Do not open any links from this message before verifying the sender through an official source.

recommendations.label: Do not enter personal data
recommendations.text: Do not enter passwords, card details, banking data or personal information through the provided link.

recommendations.label: Verify the official website
recommendations.text: Open the official website manually in the browser instead of using the link from the message.

recommendations.label: Report the message
recommendations.text: Report the message as spam or phishing and block the sender if possible.
